sections.instruction: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Choose THREE letters A-H. Which THREE options does the woman want to book?

questions.content: Which THREE options does the woman want to book?
options: A arts demonstration
B dance show
C museums trip
D bus tour at night
E picnic lunches
F river trip
G room with balcony
H trip to mountains

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: Which THREE ways of raising money for the charity are recommended?
options: A badges
B bread and cake stall
C swimming event
D concert

H quiz
I second hand sale
